title: Expanded Star Reflection Output Bank
purpose: Create a governed internal Star Reflection output-bank architecture covering every AG75B resolution and degradation state before any AG75D public runtime or UI wiring.

metadata.title: Star Reflection Panchang and Nakshatra Integration Contract
Star Reflection Runtime Request Mapping Contract
Star Reflection Runtime Response Consumption Contract
Star Reflection Basis Resolution and Degradation Policy
Star Reflection No-Storage and Runtime Non-Mutation Audit

No Storage No Backend Closure Audit

records.basis_label: Exact-window basis: Ashwini (Nakshatra index 1), usable only after AG75B proves that the complete entered birth minute lies inside one governed transition interval.
records.reflective_theme: With Ashwini used as a symbolic reflection label, this record offers a prompt around a purposeful beginning supported by a clear first step. It does not describe a fixed trait or predict an event.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: What deserves a clean beginning, and what is the smallest deliberate step you can take?
records.grounding_practice: Write one intention and complete one concrete opening action.
records.limitation_notice: This internal record may be selected only for exact_window_resolved. It is symbolic and non-deterministic, stores no personal input, and provides no medical, financial, legal, relationship, career or life-decision advice.

records.basis_label: Day-context basis only: exact birth time is unknown. A governed sunrise Nakshatra may be shown as Panchang context, but it is not the user's birth Nakshatra.
records.reflective_theme: This broader record offers a prompt to notice the overall tone of the day without forcing personal precision.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: What broad pattern deserves attention while leaving room for uncertainty?
records.grounding_practice: Choose one practical priority and one distraction to reduce.
records.limitation_notice: Exact birth time is unknown. No exact birth Nakshatra is claimed; this remains symbolic, day-level and non-deterministic.

sections.basis: Day-context basis only: exact birth time is unknown. A governed sunrise Nakshatra may be shown as Panchang context, but it is not the user's birth Nakshatra.
sections.theme: This broader record offers a prompt to notice the overall tone of the day without forcing personal precision.
sections.self_inquiry: What broad pattern deserves attention while leaving room for uncertainty?
sections.practice: Choose one practical priority and one distraction to reduce.
sections.limits: Exact birth time is unknown. No exact birth Nakshatra is claimed; this remains symbolic, day-level and non-deterministic.

records.basis_label: Input-completion basis: birth time is blank and the unknown-time option has not been selected.
records.reflective_theme: The useful theme is completion of the basis before seeking a more specific reflection.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Can you provide a valid HH:MM birth time, or should the unknown-time option be selected?
records.grounding_practice: Complete the birth-time choice before continuing.
records.limitation_notice: No runtime request or exact Nakshatra resolution is permitted while birth-time input remains pending.

sections.basis: Input-completion basis: birth time is blank and the unknown-time option has not been selected.
sections.theme: The useful theme is completion of the basis before seeking a more specific reflection.
sections.self_inquiry: Can you provide a valid HH:MM birth time, or should the unknown-time option be selected?
sections.practice: Complete the birth-time choice before continuing.
sections.limits: No runtime request or exact Nakshatra resolution is permitted while birth-time input remains pending.

records.basis_label: Input-correction basis: the birth-time value is outside the accepted HH:MM range.
records.reflective_theme: The useful theme is accuracy before interpretation.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: What valid local time between 00:00 and 23:59 should be used, or is the exact time unknown?
records.grounding_practice: Correct the time format or select the unknown-time option.
records.limitation_notice: Invalid input is not inferred or repaired silently. No runtime request or exact birth Nakshatra claim is made.

sections.basis: Input-correction basis: the birth-time value is outside the accepted HH:MM range.
sections.theme: The useful theme is accuracy before interpretation.
sections.self_inquiry: What valid local time between 00:00 and 23:59 should be used, or is the exact time unknown?
sections.practice: Correct the time format or select the unknown-time option.
sections.limits: Invalid input is not inferred or repaired silently. No runtime request or exact birth Nakshatra claim is made.

records.basis_label: Unavailable-runtime basis: the governed Panchang result reported that the requested calculation was unavailable.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate response is patience with an unavailable basis rather than interpretation without evidence.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Would it be better to retry later or review the entered date, place and timezone?
records.grounding_practice: Pause the reflection and verify the request inputs before retrying.
records.limitation_notice: No Panchang value or Nakshatra identity is inferred from an unavailable result.

sections.basis: Unavailable-runtime basis: the governed Panchang result reported that the requested calculation was unavailable.
sections.theme: The appropriate response is patience with an unavailable basis rather than interpretation without evidence.
sections.self_inquiry: Would it be better to retry later or review the entered date, place and timezone?
sections.practice: Pause the reflection and verify the request inputs before retrying.
sections.limits: No Panchang value or Nakshatra identity is inferred from an unavailable result.

records.basis_label: Runtime-error basis: the governed Panchang request did not complete successfully.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is technical restraint: an error is not a symbolic signal.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Can this request be retried after the technical condition is resolved?
records.grounding_practice: Record the error state without interpreting it, then retry later.
records.limitation_notice: A technical failure provides no reflective or predictive Nakshatra basis.

sections.basis: Runtime-error basis: the governed Panchang request did not complete successfully.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is technical restraint: an error is not a symbolic signal.
sections.self_inquiry: Can this request be retried after the technical condition is resolved?
sections.practice: Record the error state without interpreting it, then retry later.
sections.limits: A technical failure provides no reflective or predictive Nakshatra basis.

records.basis_label: Contract-mismatch basis: the response did not satisfy the governed release, runtime or privacy requirements.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is verification before use.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Which required release, runtime, cutover or privacy condition did not match?
records.grounding_practice: Stop consumption of the response and review the contract state.
records.limitation_notice: A mismatched response must not be used for Panchang context or birth Nakshatra resolution.

sections.basis: Contract-mismatch basis: the response did not satisfy the governed release, runtime or privacy requirements.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is verification before use.
sections.self_inquiry: Which required release, runtime, cutover or privacy condition did not match?
sections.practice: Stop consumption of the response and review the contract state.
sections.limits: A mismatched response must not be used for Panchang context or birth Nakshatra resolution.

records.basis_label: Limited-transition basis: the result contains a governed Nakshatra identity but lacks complete previous and next transition metadata.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is using available context without claiming unproven precision.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: What can be retained as day-level context while exact birth-time resolution remains unavailable?
records.grounding_practice: Keep the result contextual and mark exact transition proof as missing.
records.limitation_notice: Missing transition metadata blocks exact birth Nakshatra resolution; no boundary time is invented.

sections.basis: Limited-transition basis: the result contains a governed Nakshatra identity but lacks complete previous and next transition metadata.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is using available context without claiming unproven precision.
sections.self_inquiry: What can be retained as day-level context while exact birth-time resolution remains unavailable?
sections.practice: Keep the result contextual and mark exact transition proof as missing.
sections.limits: Missing transition metadata blocks exact birth Nakshatra resolution; no boundary time is invented.

records.basis_label: Invalid-index basis: the returned Nakshatra index is outside the governed 1–27 map or is not an integer.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is data integrity before interpretation.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Can the response be revalidated against the governed 27-entry map?
records.grounding_practice: Reject the malformed index and retain no Nakshatra name.
records.limitation_notice: An invalid index is not wrapped, renamed or converted into an exact birth Nakshatra.

sections.basis: Invalid-index basis: the returned Nakshatra index is outside the governed 1–27 map or is not an integer.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is data integrity before interpretation.
sections.self_inquiry: Can the response be revalidated against the governed 27-entry map?
sections.practice: Reject the malformed index and retain no Nakshatra name.
sections.limits: An invalid index is not wrapped, renamed or converted into an exact birth Nakshatra.

records.basis_label: Ambiguous-local-time basis: the entered clock minute maps to more than one instant in the resolved IANA timezone.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is acknowledging genuine timing ambiguity.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Is an explicit timezone offset or more precise source record available to distinguish the repeated local time?
records.grounding_practice: Do not choose an offset implicitly; seek a clarifying record.
records.limitation_notice: Until the repeated local time is disambiguated, no exact birth Nakshatra is selected.

sections.basis: Ambiguous-local-time basis: the entered clock minute maps to more than one instant in the resolved IANA timezone.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is acknowledging genuine timing ambiguity.
sections.self_inquiry: Is an explicit timezone offset or more precise source record available to distinguish the repeated local time?
sections.practice: Do not choose an offset implicitly; seek a clarifying record.
sections.limits: Until the repeated local time is disambiguated, no exact birth Nakshatra is selected.

records.basis_label: Nonexistent-local-time basis: the entered clock minute does not exist in the resolved IANA timezone because of a clock transition.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is correction of the time basis rather than silent adjustment.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Is there a source record showing the intended valid local time before or after the clock change?
records.grounding_practice: Review the original birth-time source and enter a valid local minute.
records.limitation_notice: A nonexistent local time is not shifted automatically and cannot support an exact birth Nakshatra claim.

sections.basis: Nonexistent-local-time basis: the entered clock minute does not exist in the resolved IANA timezone because of a clock transition.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is correction of the time basis rather than silent adjustment.
sections.self_inquiry: Is there a source record showing the intended valid local time before or after the clock change?
sections.practice: Review the original birth-time source and enter a valid local minute.
sections.limits: A nonexistent local time is not shifted automatically and cannot support an exact birth Nakshatra claim.

records.basis_label: Transition-minute basis: a governed Nakshatra transition occurs inside the entered HH:MM minute.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is respecting a boundary that minute-level precision cannot resolve.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Is a more precise source time available, or should the result remain explicitly ambiguous?
records.grounding_practice: Keep both sides unselected unless finer verified timing is available.
records.limitation_notice: The contract does not choose either Nakshatra when a transition falls inside the entered minute.

sections.basis: Transition-minute basis: a governed Nakshatra transition occurs inside the entered HH:MM minute.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is respecting a boundary that minute-level precision cannot resolve.
sections.self_inquiry: Is a more precise source time available, or should the result remain explicitly ambiguous?
sections.practice: Keep both sides unselected unless finer verified timing is available.
sections.limits: The contract does not choose either Nakshatra when a transition falls inside the entered minute.

records.basis_label: Outside-window basis: the entered birth minute lies outside the single previous-to-next transition interval proven by the runtime response.
records.reflective_theme: The appropriate theme is restraint when the available interval does not prove the requested moment.
records.self_inquiry_prompt: Can a governed runtime contract provide the additional transition needed to cover the entered minute?
records.grounding_practice: Retain the limitation state and do not extend a transition index across an unproven interval.
records.limitation_notice: The available transition metadata is insufficient for an exact birth Nakshatra resolution outside its proven interval.

sections.basis: Outside-window basis: the entered birth minute lies outside the single previous-to-next transition interval proven by the runtime response.
sections.theme: The appropriate theme is restraint when the available interval does not prove the requested moment.
sections.self_inquiry: Can a governed runtime contract provide the additional transition needed to cover the entered minute?
sections.practice: Retain the limitation state and do not extend a transition index across an unproven interval.
sections.limits: The available transition metadata is insufficient for an exact birth Nakshatra resolution outside its proven interval.
